billing.title: Billing Disputes
billing.content: Customers can raise billing disputes within 30 days of transaction. All refunds require verification of transaction ID and account ownership.

billing.title: Subscription Charges
billing.content: Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually depending on the plan. Users must cancel at least 24 hours before renewal to avoid charges.

billing.title: Late Payments
billing.content: Late payments may result in service suspension after 7 days. Reconnection is automatic after payment is completed.

tech.title: Technical Support
tech.content: Users should restart the application before reporting issues. Cache clearing and reinstall are recommended troubleshooting steps.

tech.title: Service Downtime
tech.content: Planned maintenance is communicated 48 hours in advance. Unexpected outages are resolved within 4 hours on average.

tech.title: Login Issues
tech.content: If login fails, users should reset password using registered email. Multiple failed attempts may temporarily lock accounts for security.

refund.title: Refund Eligibility
refund.content: Refunds are only available within 14 days of purchase if the service has not been significantly used.

refund.title: Refund Processing Time
refund.content: Approved refunds are processed within 5–10 business days depending on payment provider.

refund.title: Non-Refundable Cases
refund.content: Services that have been fully consumed or are under promotional discounts are non-refundable.

faq.title: General Support
faq.content: Customers can contact support 24/7 via chat or email. Response time is typically under 2 hours.

faq.title: Account Management
faq.content: Users can update personal details from the account settings page. Email changes require verification.

faq.title: Security
faq.content: We use encryption for all user data and do not store sensitive payment information on our servers.
